rationale: The answer clearly brakes the requested N+1 manual gate in the first sentence, names the repeated pattern across reimbursement stamps, budget codes, approver selection, and contract numbers, and moves upstream to shared process/data/ownership and system-validation failures. It proposes pausing the new verifier and doing cross-flow data-quality/root-cause work with rules, constraints, master data, or approval-model redesign instead. No added manual checker or review gate is supplied.
